input.background: In the smoking and education illustrative data, let group 1 (High school graduates) serve as the baseline group for comparisons.
input.question: Compare other groups to the baseline group (High school graduates) in terms of smoking behavior.

HighSchoolGraduates.description: Group of individuals who have graduated from high school, serving as the baseline group for comparisons in smoking behavior.

OtherGroups.value: Groups other than high school graduates
OtherGroups.description: Groups of individuals with different educational levels compared to high school graduates in terms of smoking behavior.

SmokingBehavior.value: Prevalence rates or other measures of smoking
SmokingBehavior.description: Measures of smoking behavior used to compare different educational groups.
